title: Find My Device - Playing Tone - app in the background
scenario: Find My Device tone stops when app is backgrounded and does not resume when brought to foreground
steps: Open the Find My Device app.
Start playing a tone on a device.
Move the app to the background (e.g., by pressing the home button or switching to another app).
Observe whether the tone continues or stops.
Bring the app back to the foreground.
Observe the state of the Play button and whether any tone is heard.
expected: The tone should continue playing when the app is moved to the background. When brought back to the foreground, the tone should still be playing or the Play button should indicate the tone is active.
